050A.name: Secure Money Intelligence Foundation
050A.purpose: Reusable security chips, source confidence, secure documents, Tower routing, receipts, final review, calm money mode, and money focus foundation.

050B.name: Employee Document Vault Wiring
050B.purpose: Employee W-2, W-4, I-9, pay stubs, direct deposit form, handbook signature routing, Tower change receipts, secure download warnings, and access receipt trail.

050B_REPAIR_MOUNT.name: Mount Employee Document Vault Preview
050B_REPAIR_MOUNT.purpose: Safely mount Pack 050B employee document vault preview underneath the existing app.

050C.name: Manager Meld Panel
050C.purpose: Manager = employee portal + manager schedule-to-payroll tools, manager ID, employee ID, receipts, escalation, and secure employee document vault access.

050C_REPAIR_TOWER_OPEN_ONLY.name: Tower Opens The Teller Only
050C_REPAIR_TOWER_OPEN_ONLY.purpose: Make The Teller require Tower clearance and remove casual Employee/Manager/Owner tab access.

050C_REPAIR_VISUAL_SHELL.name: Visual Shell Fix
050C_REPAIR_VISUAL_SHELL.purpose: Give The Teller its own styled Tower-gated shell so it does not render as plain left-aligned text.

050C_REPAIR_STYLE_INNER_PANELS.name: Style Inner Employee and Manager Panels
050C_REPAIR_STYLE_INNER_PANELS.purpose: Style the inner Employee and Manager panels so they render as designed cards, grids, buttons, chips, document vaults, and receipt sections instead of plain text.

050D_A.name: Owner Money Foundation
050D_A.purpose: Create owner money data, whimsical themes, business money lanes, owner queue, trust snapshot, protected MrkTrade lane, skincare money-only lane, and calm mode seed without mounting UI yet.

050D_B.name: Owner Visual Workspace and Theme Closet
050D_B.purpose: Mount the owner money workspace behind Tower owner clearance with whimsical themes, Today’s Money Focus, snapshot cards, business lanes, calm mode, and protected MrkTrade handling.

050D_C_FOCUS_BOARD_PREVIEW.name: Owner Anti-List Focus Board Preview
050D_C_FOCUS_BOARD_PREVIEW.purpose: Replace the list-heavy owner dashboard with a focus-board preview: large priority focus, business orbit, grouped constellations, quiet snapshot ribbon, and calm mode.

050D_C_REPAIR_PRIORITY_LAYOUT.name: Owner Focus Board Priority Layout Repair
050D_C_REPAIR_PRIORITY_LAYOUT.purpose: Fix Start Here priority card layout so text stays readable and the amount panel no longer crowds the right side.

050D_C_REPAIR_URGENT_MATTERS.name: Owner Urgent Matters Clarity Repair
050D_C_REPAIR_URGENT_MATTERS.purpose: Rename Start Here to Most Urgent Matters and replace the unclear bottom amount strip with due, money involved, and next move priority context.

050D_C_REPAIR_BUSINESS_SPECIFIC_SWITCH.name: Owner Business Specific Switch
050D_C_REPAIR_BUSINESS_SPECIFIC_SWITCH.purpose: Make business orbit selection control the business-specific workspace, actions, items, snapshot focus, and lower sections.

050D_C_ADD_OWNER_THEMES.name: Add More Owner Themes
050D_C_ADD_OWNER_THEMES.purpose: Add more whimsical owner-only themes to the private Tower-opened owner money workspace.

050D_D_SETTINGS_CORNER_AND_CALM_MODE.name: Settings Corner and Calm Mode in Settings
050D_D_SETTINGS_CORNER_AND_CALM_MODE.purpose: Move owner settings into a corner drawer and move Calm Money Mode into settings so the main owner workspace stays clear.

050D_E_OWNER_ACTION_RECEIPTS.name: Owner Action Receipts and Final Review
050D_E_OWNER_ACTION_RECEIPTS.purpose: Add final action previews, owner receipts, and click behavior for owner workspace actions so buttons feel real.

050D_F_OWNER_GUIDANCE_POLISH.name: Owner Guidance Polish
050D_F_OWNER_GUIDANCE_POLISH.purpose: Add visible workflow guidance so the owner dashboard clearly shows what to touch and in what order.

050D_G_OWNER_REVIEW_DESK.name: Owner Review Desk
050D_G_OWNER_REVIEW_DESK.purpose: Add big-picture plus small-picture review desk with manager view, clock-in cards, proof cards, pay impact, approve/hold/request proof/send Tower actions.

050H_REVIEW_DESK_FILTERS_DECISION_LANES.name: Review Desk Filters and Decision Lanes
050H_REVIEW_DESK_FILTERS_DECISION_LANES.purpose: Add owner Review Desk filters, decision state badges, approved/held/proof/Tower lanes, and filter counts.

050I_AUTO_CREATE_RECEIPTS_AND_TOWER_COPY.name: Auto Create Receipts and Tower Copy
050I_AUTO_CREATE_RECEIPTS_AND_TOWER_COPY.purpose: Make Review Desk decisions automatically create local owner receipts and a Tower handoff receipt copy at the same time.

050J_OWNER_NOTIFICATIONS_DROPDOWN.name: Owner Notifications Dropdown
050J_OWNER_NOTIFICATIONS_DROPDOWN.purpose: Add owner notifications dropdown for auto-created owner receipts, Tower receipt copies, review decisions, and proof/Tower activity.

050K_REVIEW_DETAIL_DRAWER.name: Review Detail Drawer
050K_REVIEW_DETAIL_DRAWER.purpose: Add Review Desk detail panel with time-card details, proof checklist, manager note, and detail-level approve/hold/proof/Tower actions.

050K_REPAIR_DETAIL_POPUP_AUTO_RECEIPT_V3.name: Review Detail Popup and Auto Receipt Repair V3
050K_REPAIR_DETAIL_POPUP_AUTO_RECEIPT_V3.purpose: Replace ReviewDetailPanel by function boundary so details open as a popup and detail-level decisions auto-create receipts and Tower copies.

050L_DECISION_REASONS_NOTES.name: Decision Reasons and Notes
050L_DECISION_REASONS_NOTES.purpose: Add decision reason picker, optional owner note, receipt reason capture, Tower copy reason capture, and notification reason display.

050M_PROOF_EVIDENCE_SLOTS.name: Proof Evidence Slots
050M_PROOF_EVIDENCE_SLOTS.purpose: Add proof/evidence slots, missing proof warnings, Archive Vault placeholders, and proof-reviewed data copied into owner/Tower receipts.

050N_ARCHIVE_VAULT_HANDOFF_PREVIEW.name: Archive Vault Handoff Preview
050N_ARCHIVE_VAULT_HANDOFF_PREVIEW.purpose: Add local Archive Vault evidence packet handoff preview from Review Detail evidence slots, with receipts and notifications.

050O_MANAGER_OWNER_REVIEW_BRIDGE.name: Manager Owner Review Bridge
050O_MANAGER_OWNER_REVIEW_BRIDGE.purpose: Add manager-submitted context, manager recommendations, owner decision lane, conflict/Tower escalation indicators, and manager context in receipts.

050P_MANAGER_SUBMISSION_FLOW.name: Manager Submission Flow Into Owner Review Desk
050P_MANAGER_SUBMISSION_FLOW.purpose: Add local manager submission bridge that creates owner Review Desk cards with manager context, notifications, detail popup support, receipts, and Tower copies.

050Q_MANAGER_SUBMISSION_FORM_REFINEMENT.name: Manager Submission Form Refinement
050Q_MANAGER_SUBMISSION_FORM_REFINEMENT.purpose: Replace sample-only manager submission bridge with a usable form for issue type, person, money impact, proof status, risk, manager note, Tower-sensitive flag, and owner Review Desk submission.

050R_BUSINESS_SPECIFIC_MANAGER_SUBMISSIO.name: Business Specific Manager Submission Templates
050R_BUSINESS_SPECIFIC_MANAGER_SUBMISSIO.purpose: Make manager submission templates, issue types, placeholders, quick-fill buttons, and submitted card details change based on selected business.

050S_MANAGER_STANDALONE_OWNER_SEND_BACK.name: Manager Standalone Board and Owner Send Back Bridge
050S_MANAGER_STANDALONE_OWNER_SEND_BACK.purpose: Create standalone manager workspace, local manager-owner bridge, owner send-back action, and manager return queue.

050S_REPAIR_FIX_TELLER_VIEW_RUNTIME.name: Fix Teller View Runtime Guard Error
050S_REPAIR_FIX_TELLER_VIEW_RUNTIME.purpose: Define manager route query variable inside App render scope so owner and manager views do not crash.

050T_MANAGER_RETURN_DETAIL_SEND_BACK_TO_.name: Manager Return Detail and Send Back To Owner
050T_MANAGER_RETURN_DETAIL_SEND_BACK_TO_.purpose: Add manager return-item popup, manager response/proof/correction flow, and send-back-to-owner re-review submissions.

050T_REPAIR_FORCE_SEND_BACK_VISIBLE.name: Force Send Back Button Visible
050T_REPAIR_FORCE_SEND_BACK_VISIBLE.purpose: Force owner Send back to manager button into Review Desk cards and Review Detail popup.

050T_REPAIR_C_SEND_BACK_DETAIL_ACTION_RO.name: Force Send Back Into Detail Action Row
050T_REPAIR_C_SEND_BACK_DETAIL_ACTION_RO.purpose: Inject Send back to manager into ReviewDetailPanel action row without relying on Archive button text.

050U_MANAGER_BOARD_FILTERS_RETURN_QUEUE_.name: Manager Board Filters and Return Queue Lanes
050U_MANAGER_BOARD_FILTERS_RETURN_QUEUE_.purpose: Add manager filter tabs, unified work queue, return/submission lanes, filter counts, and clearer manager work order.

050U_REPAIR_REMOVE_MANAGER_SUBMISSION_FR.name: Remove Manager Submission Bridge From Owner Dashboard
050U_REPAIR_REMOVE_MANAGER_SUBMISSION_FR.purpose: Remove manager submission form from owner dashboard while keeping manager submissions, owner send-back, and re-review flow working.

050C_REPAIR_PRIMARY_VIEW.name: Make New Teller View Primary
050C_REPAIR_PRIMARY_VIEW.purpose: Stop showing the old brown app first and make the new secure Employee/Manager Teller views the primary visible app.
